name: AppIcon
description: Adobe product icon displayed at a fixed size. Loads SVG from Adobe CDN. Used inside ProductLockup and RouterMarqueeItem.

props.name: app
props.description: App slug. Must be a key in the APP_LIBRARY map.

props.name: ariaHidden
props.description: Set false and provide ariaLabel when icon conveys meaning standalone.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Required when ariaHidden is false. Falls back to product label.

notes: By default ariaHidden=true — the icon is decorative when used inside ProductLockup.
When used standalone set ariaHidden=false and provide ariaLabel.
The inner always carries alt='' and aria-hidden='true'. Accessible label lives on the wrapper .
